title: Mushin Heat Wave
lead: Mushin is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.69. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Mushin is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74%, and winds are blowing at 12.2 km/h, providing little relief. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
